How to Get Leverage
Bonus: The Secrets of Leverage & Scale
Protect your time…
• The world will conspire to:
• distract you
• take your time
• impose it’s own agenda on you
Protect your time…
• There are time vampires…
• Being productive isn’t about getting a lot of
things done - it’s about getting the RIGHT
things done
• There are energy vampires…
• Drama queens and drama kings
• Remove yourself from those relationships and
situations

Protect your time…
• Ask yourself…
• Does this take MORE time as it grows?
• If I do this once, will it continue to pay
dividends into the future?
• (in time, money, opportunities)
Publishing
• One of the best ways to get leverage
• in marketing / traffic / prospects
• in sales
• in product
• Re-purpose what you publish
Publishing
• Platforms for publishing
• Email is king
• Some people / markets / businesses are better
suited to some platforms
• Instagram, Snapchat, Pinterest, Facebook,
YouTube…

Where will you publish?
• What are your capabilities?
• What are your interests?
• Where is your market?
• (There is no one medium that’s right for
everyone)
Add continuity sales
• Let’s you relax
• Gives you a level of guaranteed income each
month
• It does take work
• Renewal rates become one of your most
important metrics that you obsess over
• You're always fighting churn
Occam’s Razor
• All things being equal, the simplest solution is
preferable
• (I have one of the simplest businesses in this
market - I also have one of the highest margins in
my market)
• Try to keep things as simple as possible and
focus on having as high a margin as possible

Add Evergreen
• There’s risk in depending on one launch a year
• Evergreen adds in a level of safety
Re-use your marketing
• Back in my stock market days…
• 75% of people would buy within the first 30
days
• One client waited 4 years - over 1000 emails
before buying
• Lesson: Don’t get sick of your own marketing -
keep it going
Re-use your marketing
• Re-use emails
• Re-use marketing campaigns
• Re-use webinars
• Re-use your launches
• Create marketing that continues to work as
evergreen
